info.name: EffortIT Runtime API - Coder Collection
info.description:
Runtime-aligned Postman collection generated from backend routes.
Source of truth: backend/src/dinhtuyen/apitong.ts and backend/src/modules/*/*.dinhtuyen.ts.
This collection intentionally uses coder-facing names: METHOD /path.
Icons removed. Request bodies were expanded to be practical seed/insert examples.
When Postman legacy files differ from runtime, this collection follows backend runtime.

request.description:
Purpose: API health check.
Auth: public.
Response: { thongBao, thoiGian }.

Purpose: login by email/password.
Auth: public.
Fields:
- email: string, required
- matKhau: string, required
- vaiTro: ung_vien | nha_tuyen_dung | admin, optional
Response: { thongBao, duLieu } and token payload.

Purpose: login by Google credential.
Auth: public.
Fields: credential required, vaiTro optional.
Response: { thongBao, duLieu }.

Purpose: refresh access token.
Auth: public, based on refresh token.
Fields: refreshToken required.

Purpose: start forgot password flow.
Auth: public.
Fields: email required.

Purpose: validate reset token.
Auth: public.
Params: token.

Purpose: reset password by token.
Auth: public.
Fields: token required, matKhau required min 6.

Purpose: get current account from bearer token.
Auth: bearer token required.
Response: { duLieu }.

Purpose: logout contract endpoint.
Auth: optional in practice.
Response: 204 No Content.
Purpose: list users. Auth: admin.
Purpose: get user by id. Auth: admin or owner.

Purpose: create user account.
Auth: public self-register or admin create.
Fields: email, matKhau, hoTen required; soDienThoai optional; vaiTro optional.
Admin can also set trangThai.

exec: const id = data?.duLieu?.id || data?.duLieu?._id || data?.id || data?._id;

request.description:
Purpose: update user.
Auth: admin or owner.
Admin can also update email, vaiTro, trangThai.
Purpose: delete user. Auth: admin. Response: 204.
Purpose: candidate dashboard aggregate. Auth: login required.
Purpose: current candidate profile. Auth: login required.
Purpose: list candidate profiles. Auth: login required.
Purpose: candidate profile detail. Auth: login required.

body.raw:
{
  "maNguoiDung": "{{user_id}}",
  "ngaySinh": "1999-01-01",
  "gioiTinh": "nam",
  "diaChi": "Da Nang",
  "anhDaiDien": "https://example.com/avatar.jpg",
  "tomTat": "React developer with backend exposure.",
  "kinhNghiem": 2,
  "viTriMongMuon": "Frontend Developer",
  "mucLuongMongMuon": 18000000,
  "kyNang": [
    {
      "maKyNang": "{{skill_id}}",
      "mucDo": 8,
      "soNamKinhNghiem": 2
    }
  ]
}

request.description:
Purpose: create candidate profile.
Auth: login required.
Required: maNguoiDung.
Optional: ngaySinh, gioiTinh, diaChi, anhDaiDien, tomTat, kinhNghiem, viTriMongMuon, mucLuongMongMuon, kyNang[].

exec: const id = data?.duLieu?.id || data?.duLieu?._id || data?.id || data?._id;

request.description:
Purpose: create CV profile.
Auth: login required.
Required: maUngVien, tieuDe.
Supports builder sections, uploaded PDF metadata, style config, public/private flags.

exec: const id = data?.duLieu?.id || data?.duLieu?._id || data?.id || data?._id;

request.description: Purpose: update CV profile.
Purpose: delete CV profile. Response: 204.

Purpose: upload CV image/avatar.
Auth: ung_vien or admin.
Content-Type: multipart/form-data.
Field: anh (image, max 3 MB).

Purpose: upload raw CV PDF.
Auth: ung_vien or admin.
Content-Type: multipart/form-data.
Field: tep (PDF, max 10 MB).
Response also includes fileCvText and fileCvTextStatus.
Purpose: list employers/companies. Public endpoint.
Purpose: employer/company detail. Public endpoint.

request.description:
Purpose: create job post.
Auth: employer or admin.
Employer flow will auto-fill maNhaTuyenDung and force trangThai=cho_duyet.
Required: tieuDe, moTa, yeuCau.
